description_long: This bakery is a small, single-story building with a blue-tiled gabled roof and a prominent brown chimney emitting black smoke, suggesting active baking inside. The structure features a stone-tiled base, beige walls, and brown trim, with two large front windows and a central door. On one side, a large industrial gear and pipework are visible, hinting at a steampunk or industrial-inspired design. The rear of the building has a wooden door and additional piping, while a covered side entrance with a blue awning provides extra access. The roof is slightly overhanging, and the building sits on a rectangular stone platform. The overall appearance is whimsical and functional, blending traditional bakery elements with mechanical accents.
description: A whimsical bakery with a blue-tiled roof, brown chimney, stone base, and industrial gear and piping details, blending traditional and steampunk styles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, two large windows, blue roof, brown chimney with smoke, and a large gear on the right wall.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the covered side entrance with a blue awning, stone path, and visible piping along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a large industrial oven or machinery, more gears, a single window, and the continuation of the blue roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights a wooden door, additional piping, and the overhanging blue roof, with the chimney and smoke visible above.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A blue, sloped awning is present above the side entrance, made of what appears to be fabric or metal, but there is no visible bakery branding, logos, text, or patterns.
attribute_architectural_style: The building features a whimsical, industrial-inspired style with steampunk elements, such as exposed gears and pipes, combined with traditional bakery architecture like tiled roofing and stone base.
